query:
SELECT rp.id, rp.teamIdentifier, rp.planDate, rp.orderIndex, rp.createdAt, rp.firstReleasedAt, rp.lastReleasedAt, rp.archivedAt,
       rpd.dogId, dr.status, dr.updatedAt
FROM release_plans rp
LEFT JOIN release_plan_dogs rpd ON rp.id = rpd.planId
LEFT JOIN dog_records dr ON rpd.dogId = dr.dogId;
